upped your role to `maintain`, lmk if that does it
content.formatted_body: upped your role to maintain, lmk if that does it

content.body: Certainly have access to more :D Thanks!
generally champions have admin on their repos
I think our defaults should be `maintain` for champions and `write` for the rest of committee?
content.formatted_body: I think our defaults should be maintain for champions and write for the rest of committee?

content.body: but PoLP is great too, so if you have what you need with `maintain` then WFM 🙂

content.body: I think the precedent is read for everyone, and admin for champions
